context: Tests whether the answer correctly handles PencilKit content versions, unsupported ink loading, and current API availability boundaries.

checklist.name: Unsupported Loading
checklist.description: Explains that older systems throw or fail when loading PKDrawing data that uses unsupported newer inks.

checklist.name: Version Mapping
checklist.description: Maps version1 to marker/pen/pencil-era compatibility, version2 to iPadOS 17 inks, version3 to barrel-roll angle data, and version4 to reed.

checklist.name: iPadOS 16 Correction
checklist.description: States that .version2 is not sufficient for iPadOS 16 compatibility and recommends .version1 or fallback data for pre-iPadOS 17 clients.

checklist.name: Both Surfaces
checklist.description: Sets maximumSupportedContentVersion on both PKCanvasView and PKToolPicker when restricting new content.

checklist.name: Required Version
checklist.description: Uses requiredContentVersion to decide whether to sync the original drawing or a fallback.

checklist.name: Availability
checklist.description: Calls out reed as iOS/iPadOS/macOS/visionOS 26+ and custom tool picker items as iOS/iPadOS 18+ or visionOS 2+.
